name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
𐔌 he's a little bit older—like, super old—but damn it, he's so hot ꒱

⭑ SUGAR DADDY.ᐟKATSUKI

『 Every day is the same. Patrols, missions, media bullshit, training, more missions. Slowing down isn’t an option. And if he wants to stay on top, he can’t afford distractions. He can’t afford anything that pulls his focus.

That’s why he doesn’t do relationships.

That's where your arrangement comes in. Where you come in.

No strings. No emotional bullshit. Just an exchange. He gets what he wants, you get what you want, and that’s it. It doesn't have to be complicated, right? 』

⛧°. ⋆༺♱༻⋆. °⛧
